order: SHARED.md sec 7 -- contract parses 32-byte big-endian Fr in this exact order
witness: A=BUY 10 base @ 2.0, B=SELL 10 base @ 1.0 -> exec 1.5, fill 10, quote_filled 15; both fully filled; buyer (A) refunded 5 quote (price improvement); residuals 0; refund_b 0

public_inputs.name: order_commitment_a
public_inputs.description: Order A commitment (must be in active set). A is the BUY order here.

public_inputs.name: order_commitment_b
public_inputs.description: Order B commitment (must be in active set). B is the SELL order here.

public_inputs.name: fill_note_buyer
public_inputs.description: Settlement note: buyer receives fill_amount (10) of the BASE asset.

public_inputs.name: fill_note_seller
public_inputs.description: Settlement note: seller receives quote_filled (15) of the QUOTE asset.

public_inputs.name: refund_note_a
public_inputs.description: Refund of A's unused locked funds: 5 quote price-improvement (A is buy, fully filled).

public_inputs.name: refund_note_b
public_inputs.description: Refund for B (0; B is the seller, fully delivered).
